intro: Accounting & Audit Support Professional | Financial Reporting | Compliance Documentation
careerGoal: Accounting professional with experience in financial reporting and documentation, aiming to contribute to audit engagements through accurate analysis, compliance with accounting standards, and effective internal control processes.
highlights: Strong foundation in Indian GAAP and financial reporting
Hands-on experience with audit documentation and compliance
Proficient in Tally ERP, Excel, and MS Office Suite
•	Reviewed accounting entries and supporting documents to identify discrepancies and reporting inconsistencies
•	Preparing audit-ready schedules, supporting documentation, and working papers
